---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Moonlight Engine.

---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve:

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work:

---

## Use Cases

Explain how this feature would be useful to engine users:

1. Use case one
2. Use case two
3. (Additional use cases)

---

## Alternative Approaches

Have you considered other ways to accomplish this goal? Describe alternatives:

---

## Implementation Considerations

If applicable, provide any technical details or implementation suggestions:
- Potential components or systems affected
- API/interface design suggestions
- Performance implications
- Compatibility concerns

---

## Examples

Provide examples of how the feature would be used:

```cpp
// Code example demonstrating the desired feature
```

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that might help:
- Design mockups or wireframes
- Related GitHub issues
- Third-party libraries or inspiration
- External documentation

---

## Checklist

Before submitting, please verify:

- [ ] I searched for existing feature requests and found none
- [ ] The title clearly describes the proposed feature
- [ ] I provided a clear problem statement or use case
- [ ] I described the proposed solution in detail
- [ ] I considered alternative approaches
